_setup_notes.purpose: Linz Hostel Google Drive Monitor — polls the Linz Hostel shared Drive folder every 6h, notifies Rafael via Telegram when files are added or modified.
prereqs: n8n Google Drive OAuth2 credential — same Google account that has access to the Linz Hostel Drive folder
Telegram API credential (Semeadora bot — already configured)
n8n v1.x+ (Google Drive Trigger node available)
_setup_notes.activation: 1. Import JSON into n8n UI. 2. Connect 'Google Drive OAuth2' credential to the Google Drive Trigger node. 3. Test: click 'Test workflow' — should list recent files in the folder. 4. Toggle workflow Active.
_setup_notes.poll_interval: Every 6 hours (cron: 0 */6 * * *). Adjust in the Schedule Trigger node if needed.
_setup_notes.notion_note: Daniel's Notion workspace — Friedo controls access. When Rafael gets invite, add Notion → Telegram monitor as a separate workflow (use HTTP Request to Notion API GET /databases/... → compare last_edited_time).

parameters.text:
=📁 *KraftWerk Drive Update*
{{ $('Filter Recent Changes').first().json.changeCount }} file(s) changed in the last 6h:

{{ $('Filter Recent Changes').first().json.summary }}
